# kCMSampleBufferNotification_DataBecameReady

**Global Variable**

Posted on a sample buffer by the [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMSampleBufferSetDataReady(_:)] function when the buffer becomes ready.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCMSampleBufferNotification_DataBecameReady: CFString
```

## Sample Buffer Notifications

- **kCMSampleBufferNotification_DataFailed**
- **kCMSampleBufferNotificationParameter_OSStatus**
- **kCMSampleBufferConsumerNotification_BufferConsumed**: Optionally posted when a sample buffer is consumed.

items.description: Optionally posted when a sample buffer is consumed.
